p2g-desc: Short description of the PageToGitHub extension, shown on Special:Version.
pagetogithub: Product name placeholder, do not translate.
p2g-specialpage-text: Introductory text shown at the top of the PageToGitHub special page.
p2g-specialpage-config-title: Section heading for the configuration table on the special page. Contains wikitext markup.
p2g-specialpage-variables-text: Introductory sentence above the configuration variables table on the special page.
auto-upload: Prefix added to the header comment of every file uploaded to GitHub. Followed by the upload timestamp.
auto-commit: Default GitHub commit message used when the page summary is empty.
code-from-page: Second line of the file header comment, indicating the source wiki page. Followed by the namespace and page name.
p2g-config-ignoreminor: Description of the P2GIgnoreMinor configuration variable, shown on Special:Version.
p2g-config-namespace: Description of the P2GNameSpace configuration variable, shown on Special:Version.
p2g-config-owner: Description of the P2GOwner configuration variable, shown on Special:Version.
p2g-config-repo: Description of the P2GRepo configuration variable, shown on Special:Version.
p2g-config-keyword: Description of the P2GKeyword configuration variable, shown on Special:Version.
p2g-config-addkeyword: Description of the P2GAddKeyword configuration variable, shown on Special:Version.
p2g-config-authtoken: Description of the P2GAuthToken configuration variable, shown on Special:Version. The value of this variable is never displayed in the UI.
p2g-config-variable-header: Column header for the configuration variable name in the table on the PageToGitHub special page.
p2g-config-value-header: Column header for the configuration variable value in the table on the PageToGitHub special page.
